name: Twisty Beef Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 3/4 oz.) cream of mushroom soup
1 can (14 1/2 oz.) whole tomatoes, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni as directed on package; drain.
2. Brown ground beef; drain fat.
3. Combine all ingredients except French fried onions in a bowl.
4. Pour half the mixture into a greased 2 quart casserole dish.
5. Top with half a can of onions.
6. Pour remaining macaroni mixture over onions.
7. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
8. Uncover, top with remaining onions.
9. Bake for an additional 5 minutes longer.
Makes 4-6 servings.
